rationale: This candidate provides a high-quality, natural-sounding Hindi translation that maintains the technical context and Dan's direct style. It correctly translates the frontmatter title and subtitle, which were missing in the 'current' and 'qwen3-32b' versions. It also preserves all MDX structures, code blocks, and heading levels perfectly. The terminology used (e.g., 'एक्सपोज़', 'बाइंड', 'ऑथेंटिकेशन') is appropriate for a technical audience in Hindi-speaking regions.
